occurrence_sentence: University of Wisconsin Students Dive Into Quantum Computing Master's Degree

interaction_phrase: enrolled in the University of Wisconsin–Madison's inaugural
occurrence_sentence: Along with eight other students, he enrolled in the University of Wisconsin–Madison's inaugural [Master of Science in Physics – Quantum Computing](https://go.wisc.edu/mspqc) (MSPQC), the [first program of its kind](https://news.wisc.edu/new-masters-in-quantum-computing-offers-training-for-a-growing-field/) in the U.S.

interaction_phrase: enrolled in the University of Wisconsin–Madison's inaugural
occurrence_sentence: Along with eight other students, he enrolled in the University of Wisconsin–Madison's inaugural [Master of Science in Physics – Quantum Computing](https://go.wisc.edu/mspqc) (MSPQC), the [first program of its kind](https://news.wisc.edu/new-masters-in-quantum-computing-offers-training-for-a-growing-field/) in the U.S.

Along with eight other students, he enrolled in the University of Wisconsin–Madison's inaugural [Master of Science in Physics – Quantum Computing](https://go.wisc.edu/mspqc) (MSPQC), the [first program of its kind](https://news.wisc.edu/new-masters-in-quantum-computing-offers-training-for-a-growing-field/) in the U.S.
The new program grew out of a recognized workforce need, says [Bob Joynt](http://www.physics.wisc.edu/people/robert-jjoynt), professor of physics at UW–Madison and director of the MSPQC program.
Joynt and others in the department worked closely with the College of Letters & Science and the Graduate School to develop the program and curriculum.
Carlos Owens, another MSPQC student, will conduct research under physics professor Mark Saffman in the spring.
